items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Curtis Rowe. Star UCLA F was drafted 11th in 71 by DET. Was solid but not a star for DET, putting up 13.3 ppg 8 rpg thru 76. Made all-star game in 76 but traded to BOS shortly after. Tailed off suddenly in BOS & was out of NBA by 79 (age 29).
